hotel_name: Khách sạn Hanoi View Legend (Hanoi View Legend Hotel)

reviews.title: Worst place to stay
reviews.text: Even for free, i wont stay in this hotel, Dirty, smelly rooms, shady place. Dont even think about staying here, if you ever book, do not pay without checking the rooms. Worst ever placed I booked in vietnam. Should not be even in the list, nothing like photos

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: It’s not sanitary and not the same as pictures

reviews.title: Likely a scam
reviews.text:
Booked & confirmed then the staff said that they were full and willing to offer another facility. 
It was in the middle of the night.
Stay away.

reviews.title: Very very bad. This hotel is a nightmare.
reviews.positives: Nothing. The pictures in the advertisement definitely taken when the hotel is still new. All the 3 rooms given to us has  defective flooring, the curtains is not even clean, the aircon slot has holes. In fact the aircon in the first room  has defect, it's air slot is hanging. And was told that the repairman is coming. Yes the repairman came but the point is it is beyond the check in time. Thus we insisted to assign another room, but still, that room is not in good condition also, there are holes in the floor.  Also, we are wondering why they are nit accepting payment tru credit card. The girl receptionist is very arrogant in telling is that it was advised that cash payment is required. If we only have  a choice, we will not stay even for a night in this hotel. Our reservation is for two nights, at first the girl receptionist is arguing with us in her loudest voice when we are complaining about the condition if the rooms, nit decent rooms, but when one if ya told her that we will file a complaint with Booking.com, she toned down.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: It is like a scam at the wee hour of the morning
reviews.text: I booked this hotel but upon arriving the hotel was so dark no lights and we were brought to another hotel without telling us the reason just telling us we were booked to another hotel.we were booked through grab to bring us to the other hotel.Do not book with this hotel it might happen to you ,too.expecting that you have a place to sleep but directed to another hotel which was not your choice.So disappointed .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Book the hotel and receive a confirmation for the room booked. However upon arrival, the room category choice was not available and they provided us two small rooms which were in  a really bad condition and were smelling cigarette. I don't recommend it.

reviews.title: Worst Place
reviews.text: Worst Place I ever stayed

reviews.title: I do not recommend this place—completely unprofessional, misleading, and potentially dangerous.
reviews.negatives:
Extremely Unprofessional & Unsafe Experience

I had one of the worst experiences here. I had been in contact with the receptionist since I booked online, but when I arrived at the airport and messaged them (around 3am), I was told there were no rooms available and was instead redirected to a completely different hotel—without any prior notice.

When I arrived, the receptionist was asleep on the floor, and after waking up, he offered me to sleep in his own room “to help him make money.” That was completely inappropriate and made me feel unsafe as a solo female traveler.

The bathroom wasn’t even inside the room, and the hotel was located next to a loud, disgusting club—not at all what was advertised.

To make matters worse, the woman I had been in contact with became aggressive over the phone when I refused to book tours through her. I had already lost trust and just wanted to feel safe. I ended up packing my things and booking another hotel, even though I lost the money.

I do not recommend this place—completely unprofessional, misleading, and potentially dangerous.

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: The owner man and his wife both are cheater

reviews.title: Unsafe and my worst experience ever
reviews.positives: Unsafe
reviews.negatives: Unsafe…

reviews.title: Rất rất tệ
reviews.text: tôi chưa bao giờ đòi hỏi quá mức khi thuê phòng khách sạn dù cho tôi đã du lịch nhiều nơi và đã ở rất nhiều khách sạn khác nhau, nhưng ở đây tôi phải nói là rất, rất tệ từ nhân viên đến phòng ốc: phòng thì cũ kỹ, chắp vá, máy lạnh thì chạy không nổi, tủ lạnh thì không hoạt động, tivi thì hư hoặc không có tín hiệu,  nhân viên thì hoặc là lạnh lùng hoặc là vô trách nhiệm, tôi đã phải yêu cầu đổi sang phòng khác nhưng mọi thứ vẫn không khá hơn là mấy. Đây là 1 trải nghiệm rất tệ, rất khó quên của gia đình tôi. Có lẽ họ chỉ cần thu tiền vào, còn mọi thứ thì mặc kệ. Sẽ không bao giờ quay lại khách sạn này lần nữa.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Weird / bad business behaviour towards guest.

My booking for Friday, November 15th, 2024
(Standard King Room, VND 551,040), was canceled by the host.

Standard Excuse: „Lots of bed bugs”
(see other negative guest reviews including from March 4, 2023, December 17, 2023).

I was asked to find another hotel and cancel the booking myself, which I couldn’t and didn’t want to do, as a sincere host would have offered an upgrade or another solution.

Incomprehensible, why was the message sent via WhatsApp on Friday, November 15th, 2024 at 12:08 p.m. and not via booking.com? To avoid commissions?!?

reviews.title: Worst hotel
reviews.text: On the day we checked in, the ac was not functioning properly. The water inside hotel room are droplets, I could not even take a bath properly. I asked if it was possible to just pay for 1 night and I will move to different hotel for the next day but the owner refused. Instead of being relaxed, I got stressed. I do not recommend this hotel

The floor and wall of the room was damaged. Bathroom door's lock was broken.  The AC was not working. Considering the amount they charged me it was a rip off.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Worst experience  with this  hotel.Agoda shouldn't  Tie up with such kind worst hotel,by this agoda is making it's name down.Worst Hotel that I have ever been to. 

The photos uploaded by the hotel were not real. 

There are totally 3 rooms that we booked through Agoda. 

Every room had a problem one room did not have a shower head, another room did not have a toilet seat, another room had a lizard and despite requesting n number of times to speak to the owner, the owner never responded we were not given water Bottles And we had to fill up drinking water everyday from the RO filter. 

we got dirty water from the washroom tap and while we were staying at the hotel, they tried to clean the tank with guests present at the hotel. 

It was unbelievable, we did not get water for 9hrs that day. 

and above all that the house keeping guy makes such insensitive and RACIST REMARK saying that you Indians keep complaining, this is heights of racism, if we said the same thing about Vietnamese hospitalty, how would they feel. 

This complaint should be raised with the Indian embassy & Vietnamese tourism authority.

The shocking thing is that a prestigious site such as Agoda should never be associated with such a hotel it actually degrades the standard of agoda I really can't believe how can Agoda be so lax in choosing such a hotel to accept room booking.

reviews.title: The door to the balcony couldn’t get closed. The room was smelling from cigarettes. The WiFi didn’t work.
reviews.text: Terrible

reviews.title: Ok but
reviews.positives: My 5th floor balcony room was light and airy. If you get a good price (i paid $17 usd per night) it's great value for money as it has a fridge and kettle.
reviews.negatives: The reception staff were unwelcoming and unhelpful. The tv in my room was broken and, despite my repeated requests, they made virtually no effort to have it fixed. No extractor fan in the bathroom. Wifi didn't work. The position of the tv was a safety hazard.

reviews.title: Not so good
reviews.text: Room seriously needs renovation. There are exposed wires, broken things, etc. even saw a small cockroach. Worst of all, staff transferred my stuff without my permission. They checked me in on a room but when I came back to the hotel after a day tour, there are other people’s things in there and my things are already transferred to another room without letting me know

reviews.text: The hotel is not you really expected, the room is small and old view then aircon is dirty the socket for power are terrible and cr was so small and not that clean

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: When I step in, the room looks exactly like the pictures. Everything was great, except one.  Location is great in middle of old quarters, near hoan kiem lake. Comfy bed toiletries, like the kind of memory foam. hot water working etc. Even had a big window at pretty low price as compared to others. Its not even in a small alley way its in main street. So very good value for money. Its a king size and solo bed room, room isn't small compared to similar rooms in the area. Building slightly old but decor looks great.
reviews.negatives: Air con. Went in in the summer afternoon. HOT. Inform staff to fix it they say its because in the afternoon it uses solar. Didn't fix. Ok Evening time "slightly" cooler and still toleratable with fans in. Its only cold after a couple of hours. If I pay for the electric shouldn't I get to enjoy that? Probably would give a 9 stars if not for this.

reviews.title: Stayed in this property several times.
reviews.positives: Location is great. Many shops nearby. The staff members are friendly and accommodating.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is good considering the price yet it could be improved with a bit of renovation.

reviews.title: A cramped hotel in a noisy area
reviews.text: I'd no idea that the Old Town had become so congested and noisy over the years. It's best to stay in a hotel a bit away from the Old Town. Coming to the hotel, it's super-busy all the time, and it might be difficult to get the attention of reception before check-in time. Check-in time is between 12 to 1, so don't expect to get in before that. Standard rooms have a low ceiling and there could be watermarks and mold on the ceiling. If you like to be in the heart of the tourist district, this place is great. Coz you've to just step out and there are travel agencies, money changers, cafés and restaurants everywhere. The main travel bus agencies also have their bus boarding points here.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location and staff.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The location of the hotel was very good, but for us the bathroom was not clean enough.  It seemed that it was not properly cleaned, in addition to the fact that there was mold and ants in the shower/by the tiles in the bathroom.  We also saw some ants by the beds. However okay for 1-2 nights if you are backpacking.

reviews.title: Good value.
reviews.positives:
Perfect location, right in city center, many local restaurants around.
They gave me a room with very good view to the city on 6th floor :). I'm sure I could not find any room with better view than this.
reviews.negatives:
Room is old. There was almost no facility and amenity in rooms or you will not use these things :).
You should have your own personal hygiene stuffs as we can't expect much for such a cheap option.

reviews.title: Not bad

reviews.title: Mixed Experience
reviews.text:
The hotel's location was excellent, with easy access to
shopping and transportation. The staff were friendly and
helpful. However, the value for money was disappointing,
as the facilities were lacking. The cleanliness of the
property was subpar, and the room size and view were not
up to expectations. The breakfast provided was also below
par. Overall, it was a mixed experience with some positives
but several areas that need improvement.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location really good, at Old Quarter and not far from lake and famous restaurants. Staffs very nice and helpful. I stayed at this hotel 4 nights. I was early check in after back from Sapa by sleep train. For early check in to Family room the hotel charge about 250K vnd anyway i m ok fir this rate coz i can rest but i think other hotel will free of change if room free. I bought 1 day trip to Tam Coc and taxi to airport too. All reasonable price. The king room was good but not provide drinking water, have to pay at reservation by cheaper than outside store. Coffee (paid) was good too. In room was old decor and not too much things just bed and bit some damaged. It you prefer close and excellent area you can choose there. It s very good price but pls not demanding. Ohh aircon in my room had problem few times too but fast solved when ask for reservation.
reviews.negatives: Bit old room and not provide free drinking water

reviews.title: Good for short stay
reviews.text:
Hanoi View Legend Hotel… alright, let’s keep this real. We got this because of its great location.This is a basic hotel, good enough for a quick stay or overnight — at least based on my standards. 

The price is cheap, so manage your expectations and don’t expect anything fancy.
First thing — the elevator is tiny, probably fits around 4 people with luggage, so it can get a bit tight. 

The room and toilet are actually spacious, but honestly… they could use better cleaning and more lighting. Bedsheets and towels? Not the freshest, so just something to take note of. Also — no free drinking water, and the bath essentials are… not that great. 

Overall? It’s not that good… but not that bad either. If you’re just looking for a budget place to sleep for the night, no free breakfast, it works — but if you want comfort and extras, you might want to explore other options.

reviews.title: Enjoyed the stay.
reviews.positives: Like many other properties they do not serve breakfasts or meals but this is an unfortunate hangover from Covid.  There are several excellent food shops close by. The staff were pleasant and are very helpful with information and travel arrangements.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately it has a "Wet" bathroom - the shower is not screened off from the rest of the room.

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff, especially Mary, were veey helpful.
reviews.negatives: The Hanoi heat.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: The bathroom smelled really bad. We had to shut the door as much as possbile so the smell wouldn't got into the main room.  It kind of worked but the smell still escaped a little so we opened the balcony door to let the smell out and the outside air in (obviously this couldn't be done at night). The beds were also unclean. We had trouble sleeping. My back got itchy.

reviews.title: Great value hotel in central old quarters
reviews.positives: Great location, comfortable rooms, helpful staff
reviews.negatives: Can’t really fault it for the price. The rooms is on the smaller side but livable

reviews.title: Great staff, but property very worn out
reviews.text:
The only good thing about it would be the staff - very polite, well spoken, accommodating and the location is heart of old quarter. That’s it. The rooms are worn out one of the worst room stays, old installations etc only good for a night sleep. Booked way better properties for same or lower price. I see the reviews but didn’t match the expectations. 
But yes, kudos to the staff - very good. ♥️

reviews.title: Perfect location! Great staff! Highly recommend!
reviews.positives: The location is perfect! The best area in the old quarter. The staff was so friendly and super helpful with everything! Great value for the price.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Falsches Zimmer
reviews.text:
Uns wurde das günstigere Zimmer gegeben, obwohl wir das Zimmer mit 2 Queen Betten gebucht und extra mehr Geld bezahlt hatten. Der Grund war, dass wir nur zu dritt sind und das Zimmer aber für 4+ Personen passend sei.
Erst nach langer Diskussion erhielten wir wenigstens eine kleine Vergünstigung.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great place great staff great location

reviews.title: this hotel is a normal place to stay for the night
reviews.text: simple but dont come in the summer their ac is not reliable in summer

reviews.title: It is wonderful stay which I have the best experience. Good location just few steps to everywhere in center of the heart
reviews.positives:
It is wonderful stay which I have the best experience. Good location just few steps to everywhere in center of the heart of Hanoi.
Both owners and staffs are very friendly and helpful. They support me a lot to find out the way to explore old quarters of Hanoi. I feel look like as well as to stay at home.
Especially, I would like to appreciate to the receptionist at the night shift, He do very well his job. Sure, I will come back in next time.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Hmm
reviews.text: The place is nice, near Hoan Kiem Lake. The hotel charged me an additional 30,000 VND for parking my motorbike overnight, even though it is advertised as "free parking" in the app. I feel deceived.

reviews.title: Good price to quality. Superb location. Kind staff
reviews.positives: Absolutely great location, so many things nearby. The staff is very helpful. The young lady's smile in the morning, and the inviting welcome from the yoyng man in the evening works wonders! They are hard workers and although there doesn't seem to be that much staff they are still available 24/7 (even during Lunar new years) which is great. They also helped me with finding a nice tour to ha long bay. This may not be a 5-star hotel, but the price-to-quality ratio is great. Originally booked for 1 night to try it out, but I stayed for 6. Also got bumped for 1 night to a big room with a spacious balcony.
reviews.negatives: The rooms weren't dirty, but they felt a bit lived in  and could use some extra care. However, this isn't a 5-star hotel, if you expect perfection you can better pay 10x more per night at a 4/5star hotel. For the price this hotel punches above it's weight class.

reviews.title: Place is okay for the price
reviews.text: Room is clean and big enough for 2-4people. Has place for you things and a desk for your needs. Our room Airconmditioning is leaking having a  loud noises after a while. We requested to have a change of room but they did not agree and offered to have it cleaned instead. When we get back, its still the same. We ended just using the Fan in the room.

reviews.title: I would stay here again.
reviews.positives: Location perfect great staff clean
reviews.negatives: Small rooms

reviews.title: Room not prepared before check in
reviews.text: I don't know why after I check in to the room, I found 2 wet towel in toilet and ask the staff to change new towel for me, then only tell me that the room not yet be cleaned, ask us go downstairs wait for like 20 to 30 minutes for them to clean the room. I'm very unhappy with this kind of service. The front desk staff ask a lot about my planning and offer various travel package, I appreciate it. I think there are rubbish collection point nearby the hotel, sometimes will have some not so good smell when you pass by the collection point.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location, great value. Quiet and clean and comfortable

reviews.title: You can do better
reviews.text: Pretty much seconds floor of a business remodeled and rented. I only spent a night and found a much better deal at a hustle.

reviews.title: Appreciate everything
reviews.positives: Hospitality of staff
reviews.negatives: Nope. They are kind to help me book the bus to Ninh Binh

reviews.title: RoomAnd location good
reviews.text:
Need to clean ! Lobby is little
Messy

reviews.title: Clean and comfy, excellent value!
reviews.positives: Everything. It was really a stellar experience start to finish. Staff greeted me warmly and got me squared away well before check in time. My room was large and well equipped. Lots of space to store my stuff. Sparkling clean everywhere. Free toiletries, comfy bed. Big window with dark curtains. What a great spot! Unmatched value for the price too, especially in a busy part of Hanoi, and over Tet when all prices rise. I would absolutely stay here again!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Not good for this momey . Everything is old here

reviews.title: The perfect place
reviews.positives: Peter and Mary are absolutely spectacular hosts. Not only did they assist me with booking busses, tours, and my next destination, but they were warm and welcoming. I could not recommend this place more. They have all of the facilities you could possibly need and a friendly face to help you if you need assistance. They are in a perfect location, walking distance from anything fun or worth seeing in Hanoi, and anything that requires driving they can help you sort it out if needed. Also Hanoi can be pretty loud, but this place is remarkably quiet for its location.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.negatives: Las fotos no se parecen en nada a la realidad. Nos tocó la habitación 102 que es un hueco que se han sacado en la escalera que no son ni paredes y  entra toda la luz del pasillo sin poder hacer nada porque la puerta es de cristal y está pintada para que sea "opaca". Imagino que el resto de habitaciones se corresponderán con las fotos pero particularmente esa es un zulo. El baño extremadamente pequeño.

✴️ Many budget hotels in Hanoi have no windows, but this one has windows that overlook the building next door

reviews.title: Short stay
reviews.text: Booked the room to use for a few hours upon arrival from an overnight train before leaving again in 2 hours. Had informed ahead that I would be arriving at early hours around 5+ am and had received acknowledgment from hotel. Room took another 30mins to get ready which is was little strange. Otherwise hotel location is definitely great.

reviews.title: El hospedaje no cumple con las expectativas en un 100%, principalmente por la falta de limpieza.
reviews.positives: La ubicación es la mejor para conocer Old Quater
reviews.negatives:
1. La limpieza de la habitación no fue para nada la mejor, ya que en el techo habían arañas y bichos, la ropa de cama estaba manchada y las almohadas tenían hongos, por lo que  daba la impresión que no habían sido lavadas antes de colocarlas.
2. Por las cañerías del baño salía un olor horrible durante todo el día, por lo que debías mantener la puerta cerrada en cada momento. 
3. La ducha no se podía ajustar, la dirección del agua daba hacia la pared, por lo que debías bañarte sosteniendo la ducha con tu mano.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: La situación
reviews.negatives: Algo sencillo y viejo

reviews.title: good for low budget travellers. good location.
reviews.text: can't complaint much for the price at this location. several things to note though. low pressure shower but hot water works. AC wasn't turned on the first 2 nights, I didn't complaint because it was not hot during my stay. I used the fan which I prefer most of the times. room is old but clean enough. still way better than many dirty hostels (due to unhygienic travellers usually from so called "developed countries with again so-called first world mentality") good for low budget travellers with "real" first world mentality.

reviews.title: Para pasar un par de noches
reviews.positives: La ubicación. Entra en zona del transfer de bus de las excursiones. Tiene ascensor, que viene bien para las maletas. La habitación muy pequeña, sin armario. Bien para pasar 2-3 noches.
reviews.negatives: Hormigas en el baño. Agua del lavabo caía al suelo

reviews.title: Hanoi
reviews.text: Staff superb  organised everything I needed. Located right in the middle of everything

reviews.title: Buena ubicación
reviews.positives: Todo aceptable. Realmente no dormir allí, lo reservé solo para poder ducharme antes de ir al aeropuerto, ya que tenía el vuelo de vuelta a España a última hora de la noche. Ubicación perfecta
reviews.negatives: El aire acondicionado no funcionaba, lo único malo

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: The hotel's central location was fantastic,making it easy to explore the city on foot.  Restaurants and establishments just around the area. The high level room we got was clean, quite and comfortable even its getting old. Enjoyed the kettle with  teas inside the room and elevator. The staff were friendly and helpful when the water wasn't working for 2 hours.

reviews.title: Ni tan mal
reviews.positives: Estuve unas cuatro noches porque me interesaba la ubicación, y su precio tan reducido respecto a los demás. Recepción amable y las camas cómodas y limpias. Ventana enorme que entraba luz y se apreciaba la vida de la ciudad, pero nada de ruido.
reviews.negatives: El baño por las humedades y se rompió la cisterna del retrete.

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text:
Budget hotel centrally located
to nightime activities.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: La ubicacion, tenía ascensor
reviews.negatives: La habitacion era mas fea que la de la foto, ducha sin presión, cama no muy cómoda, pocos enchufes

reviews.title: Affordable accommodation near Hoan Kiem.
reviews.text: Of course, it’s an old accommodation and not the best in terms of facilities, but considering the price, I was very satisfied! I arrived a little early, but they let me check into my room, which was a bit worn but very clean. I was worried because there was a slight strange smell in the hallway, but there was no smell at all in the room. The only downside is that since the accommodation is near Hoan Kiem, there is a lot of noise outside, and the soundproofing is weak. Since I was just resting briefly before heading to the airport at night, it wasn't a big issue for me. When I went out, I ordered delivery from Lotte Mart, and the desk received everything for me, and they were very welcoming from the moment I arrived and extremely friendly!!

reviews.title: Muy caro para lo que ofrece
reviews.positives: El personal era muy amable, nos ayudaron con los tours y siempre que los necesitamos nos ayudaron. Estaba muy bien ubicado, en el centro de Hanói.
reviews.negatives: Al estar en el centro es muy ruidoso y pasamos frío en las noches. Por otro lado, el baño no estaba limpio y la ventana estaba pegada al baño de otra habitación, por ende se escuchaba todo. Por último, la ducha es abierta y se moja todo al utilizarla (aunque de todas formas es algo típico de los baños de Vietnam).

reviews.title: Decent Stay
reviews.text: Located right in Hanoi Old Quarter, decent place to stay.

reviews.positives: La ubicación está genial! Y el servicio de lavandería bueno
reviews.negatives: No pude descansar porque los ruidos de los coches afuera era horrible, desde las 4 am hasta 1 am no paraban de sonar. Además tuve un percance con los huéspedes arriba de mi habitación llegaron como a las 3 am super borrachos y estaban haciendo un gran argüende.

reviews.title: Ideal location before a trip outside hanoi
reviews.text: We had a room upgrade which has a balcony. The aircondition system was old but it's working fine. They also have a small fridge, hair blower and hot/cold shower available. The building seems to be old but the price paid is just right. The hotel is easy to look for in maps. The receptionist were also helpful.

reviews.title: Comodo
reviews.positives: Ubicación, habitación cómoda y limpia
reviews.negatives: Personal un poco indiferente.

reviews.title: So-so.
reviews.text: Access to the old town is very good. There was a refrigerator in the room, but there was no place to plug it in. When I tried to leave my luggage, there was no one at the front desk, and a child who seemed to be watching the store told me to wait, so I was made to wait for quite a long time. It seemed to be a family-run operation, and there wasn't much hotel-like service.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Buena ubicación
reviews.negatives: No anda el aire acondicionado

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great place in a great location! In the old quarter and in a walking distance to really nice places:) and the staff is sooo nice!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: En el centro de la ciudad, personal muy amable. Nos ayudaron con el taxi al aeropuerto.
reviews.negatives: El baño no estaba muy limpio y se sentía feo olor.

reviews.title: hanoi hotel
reviews.text: value for money 💛

reviews.title: Recibes lo que pagas
reviews.positives: La ubicación fue perfecta al igual que la atención del personal que se preocupó mucho por nosotros y siempre preguntaban qué tal había ido el día.
reviews.negatives: No está muy limpio, habían hormigas en el baño y nos visitaban en la habitación.  En siete días de alojamiento no limpiaron la habitación ni una sola vez. Y tuvimos que pedir toallas limpias a los 4 días porque tampoco nos dieron las del primer día y listo.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Affordable! Great staff!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Su ubicación, apenas a 5 minutos andando del Lago. Peter nos ayudó mucho con las gestiones iniciales (tarjeta de teléfono, cambio dinero..etc)

reviews.title: Couple
reviews.text: Had a really good stay here, so much we came back after our trip to Ha Giang :) room is quite hot though before AC kicks in. But apart from that was good!

reviews.title: Buena opción barata en Old Quarters
reviews.positives: La ubicación es inmejorable, justo en el Old Quarters, y el hotel es limpio y con una buena relación calidad-precio. La habitación es pequeña pero suficiente, la cama es cómoda y el baño está bien. Cuenta con ascensor y recepción 24 horas. También tienen servicios de tours, lavandería y otros. Está bastante bien.
reviews.negatives: La comunicación en la recepción es algo complicada por el tema de idioma. El baño está bien pero tampoco despunta mucho. La habitación es pequeña. El general se nota más antiguo pero está bien.

reviews.title: Great Location
reviews.text: We stay here because of the location, this hotel we chose as out transit place after we arrived in Hanoi late at night, around 10pm from Sapa. The staff very responsive to our request. Clean and great location.

reviews.title: Excelente ubicación
reviews.positives: La ubicación. La habitación muy cómoda.
reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.title: Simple but Great
reviews.text: Simple hotel but really nice. This hotel centre of Hanoi old quarter area. Easy to access all places. Lot of shops around this hotel. Friendly and helpfull staffs. Value for money.

reviews.title: Excelente ubicación
reviews.positives: excelente ubicación!
reviews.negatives: nada

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Had. A lovely 3 night stay there at a reasonable price .   The beds were comfy and the rooms large .  They were basic but I had a very comfortable stay and would have remained if the price had not doubled for the weekend.  Would stay again

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
La ubicación era perfecta en el centro de la ciudad. 
Precio calidad estaba bien, las camas eran cómodas y el baño limpio.
reviews.negatives:
Notamos despreocupación por parte de la recepción. 
La pieza daba para la ventana donde escuchamos las dos noches y en durante el día llorar a un gatito que estaba amarrado todo el tiempo. Preguntamos que hacer y no hubo interés.

reviews.title: Pretty close to many local hotspots
reviews.text: Recommend

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Está muy bien ubicado y la relación calidad - precio es muy buena.
reviews.negatives: Es un sitio de paso, no para quedarse tiempo, la habitación algo incomoda y se escuchaba todo de fuera.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: v额额额呀well

reviews.title: gran ubicación y excelente servicio para organizar el resto del viaje en Vietnam.
reviews.positives: el personal fue muy servicial. atentos y agradables. la ubicación era fantástica. Mery nos ayudó con toda la organización del resto del viaje por Vietnam de forma atenta y con buen precio.
reviews.negatives: se equivocaron con la habitación que nos dieron la primera noche, pero rectificaron sin problema cuando se lo comentamos.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Staff is helpful, cleaning need to be improved and noisy from the street

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Ubicación

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.text: Noisy from outside but good location

reviews.title: Recomendable
reviews.positives: Cama cómoda, ubicación buena
reviews.negatives: El aire estaba roto, mal olor en el baño con muchas humedades

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Right in old quarter. Easy walk to eateries, and shopping

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Comodidad de las camas, ubicación, amplitud...
reviews.negatives: La presion del agua de la ducha...

reviews.title: Big room with balony
reviews.text: Clean and big room. Don’t provide mineral water, have to buy from them. Next to eateries and shopping streets in old quarter.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ubicación excelente y habitación súper cómoda. Personal muy agradable y hablan muy bien inglés. Tienen servicio de lavandería y se pueden comprar allí mismo tours o billetes de autobuses.

reviews.title: Super Comfortable
reviews.text: We really enjoyed our stay here! The staff is more than friendly + helpful. Beds are very comfortable, and location is perfect!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Buena ubicación, personal amable, habitación limpia.

reviews.title: 3 day stay in Hanoi
reviews.text: Excellent location. Clean and friendly staff.

reviews.title: Nos hospedamos 2 veces en este hotel y volveríamos a elegirlo!
reviews.positives: La ubicación es insuperable a pasos de todo! Mary fue muy amable y nos ayudó con toda la información que necesitábamos. La habitación estaba limpia y era amplia. El balcón nos encantó ya que nos permitió sentarnos en las tardes para ver como funciona la ciudad. El barrio es muy tranquilo y seguro. Servicio de lavandería, taxi y todo lo que necesites.
reviews.negatives: La velocidad del wifi era un poco intermitente, el baño necesita algunas renovaciones pero no nos importó mucho.

reviews.title: Affordable!
reviews.text: Good location and clean!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Personal muy atento y servicial. Ubicación perfecta. Todo bien.

reviews.title: I recommend this place
reviews.text:
This was our second hotel in Hanoi. The room was tidy and everything functioned. Great location. Nice view towards the street. The owners were friendly and helpful. 
Our previous hotel had completely different vibe, not really taken care of. The pictures can be deceiving. 
I'd stay in Hanoi view legend hotel again.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Je mets rarement des avis mais il fallait quand même que je fasse part de ce que j’ai vécu.
J’arrive aux alentours de 2:00 AM le réceptionniste me dit que je n’ai pas de clé et étant donné que je reste qu’une nuit je n’ai rien à craindre.
Je pars manger un bun cha je reviens aux alentours de 4:00 AM, et il y a quelqu’un dans mon lit à moitié bourré. Ce qui est aberrant, le débit de la douche aussi est terrible.
Je recommande pas…

reviews.title: It you are a choosey person, I won't recommend it to you.
reviews.text:
Hanoi is a high demanded traveling destination in Asia.
Therefore, if you are not planning ahead over one month or above, you probably end up like me 🤣
It's a bit noisy at night, cleanness is ok, and there's not many things you can enjoy. But at least you have place to stay, you have bed to sleep. Enough for me 😉

reviews.title: Horrible,  à fuir
reviews.positives: Absolument rien
reviews.negatives:
Nous avions réservé une chambre avec 3 lits simples. En arrivant, le réceptionniste nous dit que ce n’est pas possible et que nous aurons un lit double et un simple. Ca commence mal….
La chambre était sale, les draps étaient douteux et étaient infestés de cheveux de locataires précédents. 

Une mauvaise odeur regnait dans la salle de bain, la « porte » pour fermer le balcon était en fait une porte en bois qui ne se fermait pas … 

Nous avions commandé un taxi pour le lendemain nous rendre à l’aéroport, le réceptionniste avait oublié de le réserver. 

Je ne recommande absolument pas cet hôtel qui ne mérite absolument pas ce score.

reviews.title: Good Location, Helpful Hosts
reviews.text: The property is located in the old quarter so it was easy to get everywhere. The AC in the room was good. Peter, the host, gave us tips for how much to pay for things around the city and helped us plan most of our north Vietnam tours.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: L' hôtel ne correspond pas du tout aux photos mises sur Booking je pense qu'il y a beaucoup de personnes qui mettent de faux commentaires alors arrêtez de raconter des histoires.
reviews.negatives: Rien de bien !!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent location.  A little older, but well maintained.  Large room.  Location is the main attraction.

reviews.title: Problème avec le ménage
reviews.positives: Bon emplacement
reviews.negatives: Chambre sale… les draps du lit n’avaient pas été changés… il y avait des taches de fluide, des cheveux, des poussières dessus.. idem pour la salle de bain, non nettoyée

reviews.title: Awesomeness
reviews.text: All in all, we had a great experience staying in this hotel, why? It's because it's walking distance with all the shops, restaurant, park, everything. The staff knows a little bit of english, so download google translate, but they are approachable. Good value for money. We're a group of 7 btw, from Philippines stayed there for 3days and 2nights.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Rien à part l' ascenseur.
reviews.negatives:
Chambre ne correspondant pas mais alors pas du tout aux photos et aux avis 
Salle de bain insalubre et odeur.
Tapis de sol de la salle de bain taché et humide.
Le climatiseur qui tient avec du scotch et qui ne fonctionne pas réellement et quand c'est le cas cela fait un bruit épouvantable 
Si vous voulez réservé,regardez les avis Google qui sont bien plus juste que sur Booking (avis certainement faux)..
Fenêtre qui ne ferment pas .
Trop cher pour la chambre.
Parties communes mal entretenues et sales.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very nice group of people running the hotel... great location!

reviews.title: Hôtel à fuir.
reviews.positives: J'y ai vraiment rien aimé sinon l'accueil des gérants.
reviews.negatives: Hôtel très insaluble, mini chambre minable avec un équipement minimum. Un bruit infernal, une fenêtre face à un taudis voisin. Hôtel à fuir, ne devrais pas être référencé par booking.

reviews.title: Great vallue
reviews.text:
They upgraded our room, room was very clean and comfortable.
It was quite noisy in the morning with street noise so would recommend asking for a room off the street if you want to sleep in.

reviews.title: Tarif attractif
reviews.positives: Très bien placé au centre de la vieille ville
reviews.negatives: Un peu bruyant, pour la propreté, par contre plutôt négatif. Je ne suis pas sûr que les draps aient été changés avant mon passage.

reviews.title: Solid hotel
reviews.text: Solid cheaper end hotel, comfy beds, AC and fan in room, good sized bathroom, solid location, I’d recommend for sure to anyone on a budget who also wants a decent spot for a few nights.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: L’emplacement. On est à 3 min à pied du lac dans le vieux quartier.
reviews.negatives:
Énorme trou dans le plafond qui donne accès à la pièce commune et donc laisse libre accès à tous les moustiques…… 
Il a fallu le boucher avec ce qu’on avait sous la main, sinon c’était open bar pour les moustiques. 
Extrêmement mal insonorisé : réveillé à 6h15 du mat par un raclement de gorge d’une personne dans la rue.. c’est pour vous dire le niveau d’insonorisation ! 
Heureusement que ce n’était que pour une nuit, j’aurai pris un autre logement dans tous les cas !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Easy to go around the old quarter city. Near to halal restaurant

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Personnel gentil et accueillant, proche du centre ville,
Bon rapport rapport qualité prix !
reviews.negatives:
Plusieurs petit bémol :
Manque de finissions dans la chambre, ce qui nous a valu la visite de petit rongeur !
Il suffirait que les murs soit fini pour éviter cela.
La télé ne fonctionnais pas, dommage car on avait prit la chambre avec télé pour l'utiliser.
Chasse d'eau défectueuse.
De petites choses qui peuvent être régler, dommage nous avons croisé personne à notre départ pour signaler cela,
Merci quand même pour ce séjour

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text:
Nice room and great staff!
(I stayed 3 night, double room)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
L’emplacement de l’établissement était super et le personnel très gentil!
Cependant, ça fait 2 mois que nous écumons les hôtels et auberges de jeunesses en Thaïlande et au Vietnam, et c’est la première fois qu’une chambre ne ressemble PAS DU TOUT à ses photos….
La chambre n’était pas du tout isolée, nous avons entendu les voitures/ scooters toute la nuit, ne parlons pas des Klaxons… nous avions au moins de l’eau chaude…
Je ne recommande pas..

reviews.title: 10/10 would stay again
reviews.text: Great place, even better staff. Don't miss out on the amazing coffee!

reviews.title: bof
reviews.positives: Personnel sympas
reviews.negatives: Je n'avais pas réservé cet établissement. celui que j'avais réservé m'as déplacé dans leur second établissement qui ne correspondait pas à ce que j'avais réservé.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice service❤️❤️

reviews.title: Médiocre
reviews.positives: Proche de centre ville, service efficace
reviews.negatives: La chambre et les équipements sont très vieux, la propreté est à revoir

reviews.title: EXCELLENT
reviews.text: Great place to stay. Staff very welcoming and helpful and I was really happy with my room. Thank you so much.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Emplacement, personnel
reviews.negatives: Mauvaise odeur dans la salle de bain, porte de la chambre avec vitre opaque qui laisse passer la lumière du couloir

reviews.title: one of the best in the old quarters of hanoi
reviews.text:
Very good and very helpful. they don't cancel on you and helps you find the places you need to visit. 
has lift.

reviews.title: Passable pour une nuit
reviews.positives: Proche des commerces et la rue du train est accessible à 10mn à pieds
reviews.negatives: La clim ne fonctionnait pas et avec plus de 30 degrés à l’extérieur et presque 90% d’humidité, dur de trouver le sommeil avec un simple ventilateur. La chambre est dans son jus, mais suffit pour une nuit

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.text: I highly recommend this hotel. Very accessible to the local market and night market . Affordable and verygood

reviews.title: Pour une nuit ou 2 pas +.
reviews.positives:
L’emplacement au cœur de la vieille ville on peut tout y faire à pied.
Un frigo à disposition 
Un petit balcon qui a le mérite d’etre là
Produit douche en grande quantité 
Assez calme la nuit et au petit matin on entend de nouveau les Klaxons.
reviews.negatives:
Revoir la propreté:  c’est passable
Le sèche cheveux qui fond car plus aucune résistance. Le 2ème que j’ai demandé ne faisait pas d’air chaud… bref il faudrait refaire le stock des sèches cheveux !
Serviette de bain très petite encore une fois….
Forte humidité dans la chambre…
Prix relativement élevé pour les prestations proposées..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice location. Thank you.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Bruyant, vétuste

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice location. Thank you.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
L'emplacement dans le Vieux Quartier pour visiter Hanoï 
Literie ok
reviews.negatives:
Pas de petit déjeuner inclus contrairement à ce qui avait été réservé.
Chambre familiale donnant sur la rue donc très bruyante.
Salle de bain et équipements vétustes, pas de poubelles, nécessaire de s'acheter son eau en bouteille...
Rapport qualité prix qui ne correspondait pas même si bien placé.

reviews.title: This place is great when you visit Ha Nội
reviews.text: Every thing is prefect from staff to service to quality

reviews.title: Bien pour une ou deux nuit
reviews.positives: L’emplacement est top, la chambre est assez spacieuse
reviews.negatives: Sale de bain pas hyper propre, trop lumineux, assez bruyant, personnel souriant, la Tv est inutile

reviews.title: very accommodating staff
reviews.text: we only stayed for 7 hours as we just needed to get a place to stay while we  waited for our flight back home. Its the cheapest one we can find so didnt expect much. but we got 2 large decent beds and a working bathroom. thats actually all we needed 🙂

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Wifi
Localisation
reviews.negatives: Mal entretenu l'hôtel a du potentiel mais doit être renouvelé. Bien pour une nuit de passage pas plus

reviews.title: Great value for money hotel
reviews.text: Good hotel

reviews.title: Agréable si vous n'êtes pas trop exigeant.
reviews.positives: La chambre était propre (tout sauf la vaisselle), les lits étaient confortables.
reviews.negatives:
Les équipements étaient vraiment bancals:
- Il y a un gros trou au plafond dans la salle de bain
- Les toilettes sont dans la douche
- Les canalisations du lavabo s'écoulent dans la douche
- Le câble du ventilateur est cassé et réparé au scotch, ce qui produit des étincelles quand on le branche.
- Les lumières tressautent facilement

reviews.title: nice lication
reviews.text: nice location

reviews.title: Bien pour une nuit de passage
reviews.positives:
Ok pour une nuit entre deux bus. Lit confortable mais hôtel un peu vétuste. 
Bien placé dans le vieux quartier.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The receptionist is gentle, cheerful, and very enthusiastic in guiding guests; the housekeeping staff is polite, and the reception is 100% professional, but it doesn’t have any ❤️.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: L'emplacement et la gentillesse des propriétaires
reviews.negatives: Chambre humide, et nous avons vu un cafard dans la chambre.

reviews.title: Good for solo traveler and for really good location
reviews.text: Worth the price! The location of this hotel is near everywhere you want to explore. Only 5 minutes walks to hoan kiem lake. Thankyou

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Très bon emplacement..

reviews.title: Couple stay
reviews.text: We had a good stay here, good location and the hotel staff arranged to get some of our shoes cleaned that was really dirty. Very helpful

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Bien placé dans la vieille ville.
reviews.negatives: Pourrait être rafraîchi.

reviews.title: Extremely Budget Friendly
reviews.text:
This is a very budget friendly hotel located in a prime location in the town.

The receptionist is a jack of all trades. Name a service and she has it. We took our whole Vietnam trip services from her at a very cost effective price. Also, she upgraded our room at the same price.

reviews.title: Agréable
reviews.positives: Emplacement

reviews.title: Great 👍
reviews.text: Staff is so nice, location is great, rooms was cosy, beautiful. Facilities are good. Would be nicier to have just a drinking water in the room. But all good 👍

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives:
Très bien situé dans le centre de Hanoï! 
Il y a un service de taxi pour l’aéroport. 
Les propriétaires sont adorables ! 
Pas trop cher pour Hanoï
reviews.negatives:
aucune insonorisation entre les chambres et l’extérieur, donc on entendait les travaux dans la rue toute la nuit,
une petite couverture assez juste pour l’hiver, et pas d’eau gratuite dans la chambre

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good, very friendly

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Emplacement ideal au centre du quartier animé ...notre chambre tout en haut donnant sur une ruelle bénéficiait de calme
reviews.negatives:
Petit Hotel très basique sans grand confort ...
Peut suffire pour dormir ...sans plus ..
Les parties communes et la salle de bain sont plutôt vétustes..

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: I traveled with my 22 months old baby and my husband and everything went smoothly the room we've had is clean and spacious enough with a big bed.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: emplacement dans Hanoï, bon rapport qualité-prix, personnel chaleureux
reviews.negatives: très bruyant et très lumineux la nuit et dès le lever de soleil.. la porte de la salle de bain étant translucide, il serait pertinent de la rendre opaque..

reviews.title: Spacious, airy room with an elevator.
reviews.text:
Room on the 4th floor. There is an elevator, it is airy, with large windows, overlooking the alley beside the hotel. The hotel is located at the corner of two streets, combined with food sales and tourism services. The restroom on the ground floor corner of the food section is very small, about 1m2, no sink, and the toilet flush is weak.

However, the room is spacious, has a wardrobe & many clothes hangers, the built-in refrigerator in the wooden cabinet gets quite hot when in use (so it should be opened). The restroom has a window along with the series of windows in the bedroom. The inside button lock is simple, and the outside key lock works well, with a surveillance camera in the hallway...

It takes about 5 minutes to walk to the lake, eat bun cha at the corner of Hang Manh, which is mediocre, a lot, and expensive at 110k/portion with spring rolls. Sugarcane juice is 20k! In the morning, you can buy sticky rice at 44 Hang Hom, convenient and right in front of the hotel, look to the left across the street, sticky rice is delicious, cheap, and popular with locals, only 10k/huge package! If you want to eat local-style banh mi, go to Tô Tịch nearby, it’s good, cheap but doesn’t come with pickled vegetables.

reviews.title: Excellent rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives: Emplacement dans un quartier très vivant et agréable. Services annexes au top.
reviews.negatives: Certains éléments sont vieillissants (une clim capricieuse par exemple)

reviews.title: The best

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 2eme séjour dans cet hôtel, pour une nuit cette fois ci, de passage à Hanoï. Excellent emplacement en plein cœur de la vieille ville, bon rapport qualité prix, grand lit très confortable, ascenseur, personnel souriant et parlant anglais, les chambres sont faites à la demande, possibilité de faire sa lessive pour le soir même, et de réserver ses excursions
reviews.negatives:
Il faudrait ameliorer l'insonorosation ! C'est calme entre 22h et 5h...
En ayant réservé quelques heures avant d'arriver, ils n'utilisent pas le système de réservation de Booking, et on était pas sûrs d'avoir la chambre

reviews.title: Really nice and like

reviews.negatives: Les matelas des lits très durs.

reviews.title: Great staff, great location, great hotel
reviews.text:
Have stayed at 3 hotels in Hanoi, this is my favorite.
Staff Peter & Mary speaks good English, helpful, cheerful and reply quickly to WhatsApp messages.
Great location - minutes to lake, fantastic street food
Great value for price- nice rooms with windows, quiet street, toiletries 
Nice clean lobby one can hang out

reviews.negatives: Il faudrait ameliorer l'insonorosation ! C'est calme entre 22h et 5h... Salle de bain à nettoyer un peu plus en profondeur

reviews.title: Chambre froide
reviews.text:
Emplacement sympa et centrale pour ce balader
Chambre dans un sale état, très vétuste, très très bruyante mais surtout extrémité froide et humide.  
Salle de bain délabrée, une simple petite couverture dans housse et laissant à désirer sur la propreté 
Je ne recommande pas surtout à ce prix 18€ /nuit ça les vaut pas

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'emplacement,  le personnel  super sympa!
reviews.negatives: Trop de bruit là nuit et le matin!! ( mais il y avait des travaux dans la rue) alors pas vraiment de leur faute.

reviews.title: Acceptable pour un très court séjour
reviews.text:
Refuser la chambre 102 au 1er étage car elle est toute petite chambre, bruyante, en mauvais état et la fenêtre, qui ne ferme pas, donne directement sur l'immeuble voisin, demandez une chambre au 3ème étage au moins, ils l'ont fait pour moi mais le lendemain seulement (ils ont fait pareil avec le  couple d'avant)
Le sol est en parquet stratifié mais en très mauvais état comme la télé, le réfrigérateur ne fonctionne pas, ils ne fournissent pas la moindre bouteille d'eau potable ni de petit déjeuner. Le personnel est néanmoins professionnel et agréable, les serviettes et draps sont propres.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: très bon rapport qualité/prix
reviews.text:
J'ai testé pleins d'hotels à hanoi et celui-ci est l'un des meilleurs rapports qualité/prix.
Accueil chaleureux, propreté assez bien et surtout wifi impeccable.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Certaines chambres sont un peu petites....

reviews.title: Spot idéal pour hanoi
reviews.text: J'hésitais à réserver cet hôtel au vue des photos mais les commentaires sur le personnel m'ont convaincu et je ne regrette pas du tout. L'hôtel est très bien placé (bien entendu c'est hanoi donc bruyant) mais le personnel est là pour aider dans votre voyage.
